violations.text: The service area/menu boards are lacking an allergen statement. Sign was placed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Sliced turkey was observed held beyond 7 days. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Yogurt parfaits and backed goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC stated that they received a label maker and are in process of setting it up. Label criteria information provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the loading dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Refrigerator located near the service line was not in good repair, observed with an ambient temperature of 48 degrees. Per PIC, temperature was at 40 degrees when they arrived this morning. All foods requiring refrigeration were moved to other units. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC brought items to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC diluted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Recently prepared tuna salad was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided label guidance at inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the trash room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration gaskets and the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The cabinet in the service area is in poor repair. Doors were observed falling off the hinges. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Two lights under hood were not functioning at the time of inspection. PIC stated work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
